flags.what: Small grey captions (daylines, category·time subtitles, period, meta) sit marginally under the 4.5:1 small-text contrast floor.
flags.fix: Darken those specific captions one shade toward --ink-700, keeping the muted tier for larger secondary text.

flags.what: No loading or error states for a live data layer; the mockup is synchronous.
flags.fix: Design a loading state for the recent list, a pending affordance for the add action, and an inline error + recovery when an amount is rejected.

flags.what: The budget bar animates its width and transitions use default easing.
flags.fix: Animate the bar with a transform-based fill and use a considered easing token.

recommendation: Strong, distinctive, on-brand work that clears the bar on clarity, hierarchy, and consistency and holds across mobile, tablet, and desktop. Customer approved as-is; the two UX-debt findings (small-caption contrast, async loading/error states) are captured as build follow-up.
assessed: current/index.html + design-system.md, with the rendered snapshot read directly (render confirmed)
